ocr.text: In the analysis of iron ratios, the table presents five conditions with their respective median saliva/serum iron ratio, median
saliva/serum ferritin ratio, and median saliva/serum iron binding capacity ratio, where the Control group has a median
saliva/serum iron ratio of 1.2, a median saliva/serum ferritin ratio of 1.4, and a median saliva/serum iron binding capacity ratio
of 1.1; Thalassemia Major shows a median saliva/serum iron ratio of 1.3, a median saliva/serum ferritin ratio of 0.8, and a
median saliva/serum iron binding capacity ratio of 1.1; Thalassemia Intermedia presents a median saliva/serum iron ratio of 1.1,
a median saliva/serum ferritin ratio of 0.8, and a median saliva/serum iron binding capacity ratio of 1.2; Thalassemia Trait also
shows a median saliva/serum iron ratio of 1.1, a median saliva/serum ferritin ratio of 0.8, and a median saliva/serum iron
binding capacity ratio of 1.1; and Iron Deficiency Anemia has a median saliva/serum iron ratio of 1.8, a median saliva/serum
ferritin ratio of 2.7, and a median saliva/serum iron binding capacity ratio of 2.1.
Median saliva /serum iron ratio  Median saliva /serum ferritin ratio  Median saliva /serum iron binding capacity ratio
Control  1,2  1.4  1.1
Thalassemia Major  1,3  0.8  1.1
Thalassemia Intermedia  1.1  0.8  1.2
Thalassemia Trait  1.1  0.8  1.1
Iron Deficiency Anemia  1.8  2.7  2.1
Thermal dissipation method  Saturated temperature of the μ-processor
Cooling fan method  50°C
Distilled water  35°C
CNT based liquid (0.2 g MWCNTs-COOH/litre)  34°C
CNT based liquid (0.4 g MWCNTs-COOH/litre)  32°C
CNT based liquid (0.6 g MWCNTs-COOH/litre)  31°C
CNT based liquid (0.8 g MWCNTs-COOH/litre)  29°C
CNT based liquid (1.0 g MWCNTs-COOH/litre)  28°C
CNT based liquid (1.2 g MWCNTs-COOH/litre)  28°C
Furthermore, the thermal dissipation method table details the cooling fan method with a saturated temperature of the μ-
processor at 50°C, while distilled water shows 35°C, CNT based liquid (0.2 g MWCNTs-COOH/litre) at 34°C, CNT based
liquid (0.4 g MWCNTs-COOH/litre) at 32°C, CNT based liquid (0.6 g MWCNTs-COOH/litre) at 31°C, CNT based liquid (0.8
g MWCNTs-COOH/litre) at 29°C, and CNT based liquid (1.0 g MWCNTs-COOH/litre) and (1.2 g MWCNTs-COOH/litre) both
at 28°C.
